title: To His Valentine On St. Valentine's Day.
content:
Oft have I heard both youths and virgins say
    Birds choose their mates, and couple too this day;
    But by their flight I never can divine
    When I shall couple with my valentine.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To His Valentine On St. Valentine's Day."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
